name: netsec-skills
description: Pentesting skills pack -- 17 tool skills, 6 workflows, 3 agent personas for network security testing with Claude Code

skills.name: nmap
skills.description: Network scanning and host discovery using nmap wrapper scripts

skills.name: tshark
skills.description: Packet capture and network traffic analysis using tshark wrapper scripts

skills.name: metasploit
skills.description: Exploitation framework wrapper scripts for payloads, scanning, and listeners

skills.name: aircrack-ng
skills.description: WiFi security auditing and WPA cracking using aircrack-ng wrapper scripts

skills.name: hashcat
skills.description: GPU-accelerated password hash cracking using hashcat wrapper scripts

skills.name: skipfish
skills.description: Active web application security scanner using skipfish wrapper scripts

skills.name: sqlmap
skills.description: SQL injection detection and database extraction using sqlmap wrapper scripts

skills.name: hping3
skills.description: TCP/IP packet crafting and firewall testing using hping3 wrapper scripts

skills.name: john
skills.description: Password hash cracking and identification using John the Ripper wrapper scripts

skills.name: nikto
skills.description: Web server vulnerability scanning using nikto wrapper scripts

skills.name: foremost
skills.description: File carving and forensic data recovery using foremost wrapper scripts

skills.name: dig
skills.description: DNS record querying and zone transfer testing using dig wrapper scripts

skills.name: curl
skills.description: HTTP request debugging and SSL inspection using curl wrapper scripts

skills.name: netcat
skills.description: TCP/UDP networking swiss-army knife using netcat wrapper scripts

skills.name: traceroute
skills.description: Network path tracing and latency diagnosis using traceroute and mtr wrapper scripts

skills.name: gobuster
skills.description: Directory and subdomain brute-forcing using gobuster wrapper scripts

skills.name: ffuf
skills.description: Web fuzzing for parameters, directories, and endpoints using ffuf wrapper scripts

skills.name: recon
skills.description: Run reconnaissance workflow -- host discovery, DNS enumeration, and OSINT gathering

skills.name: scan
skills.description: Run vulnerability scanning workflow -- port scans, web vulnerability scans, and SQL injection testing

skills.name: fuzz
skills.description: Run fuzzing workflow -- directory brute-force, parameter fuzzing, and web scanning

skills.name: crack
skills.description: Run password cracking workflow -- hash identification, dictionary attacks, and brute force

skills.name: sniff
skills.description: Run traffic capture and analysis workflow -- HTTP credentials, DNS queries, and file extraction

skills.name: diagnose
skills.description: Run network diagnostic workflow -- DNS, connectivity, and latency checks

skills.name: scope
skills.description: Define and manage target scope for pentesting engagements

skills.name: netsec-health
skills.description: Check that all pentesting safety hooks are installed and working

skills.name: check-tools
skills.description: Check which pentesting tools are installed on this system

skills.name: report
skills.description: Generate a structured pentesting findings report from the current session

hooks.name: netsec-pretool
hooks.description: Target allowlist validation and raw tool interception -- blocks out-of-scope targets and direct tool calls

hooks.name: netsec-posttool
hooks.description: Audit logging and JSON bridge -- logs tool executions and injects structured context from JSON output

agents.name: pentester
agents.description: Offensive pentesting specialist for multi-tool attack workflow orchestration

agents.name: defender
agents.description: Defensive security analyst for remediation guidance and risk assessment

agents.name: analyst
agents.description: Security analysis specialist for structured report synthesis across multiple scans
